description: A demand-record (DemandRecord) holding a manual, procurement-only forecast entry: an expected quantity for an item in a month or quarter. From Al Bahja: forecasting is manual and procurement-only (not a planning module), entered as month/quarter x quantity, with a variance flag raised when actual deviates beyond a configurable band. It feeds the analytics forecast view and market-price watch, not the requisition flow directly.

fields.name: forecastId
fields.label: Forecast No.
fields.purpose: Stable key for one forecast entry so the variance computation and audit attach to a specific item-period row; lets a buyer edit or retire an entry without re-keying.

fields.name: itemId
fields.label: Item
fields.validation: an existing item; resolved by the entity normalizer (item -> description)
fields.purpose: The item being forecast; ties the expected quantity to a specific item so the variance flag compares forecast vs actual procurement for that item and feeds market-price watch.

fields.name: periodType
fields.label: Period Type
fields.validation: one of {MONTH, QUARTER}; the grain of the forecast
fields.purpose: States whether the entry is a monthly or quarterly forecast (AB month/quarter x quantity); the grain the variance band and the actual-vs-forecast rollup compute at.

fields.name: period
fields.label: Period
fields.validation: the period label e.g. 2026-05 (month) or 2026-Q2 (quarter); must match periodType; unique per (itemId, period)
fields.purpose: The specific month or quarter the forecast quantity applies to; the time bucket the variance computation matches actual procurement against.

fields.name: quantity
fields.label: Forecast Quantity
fields.validation: >= 0; the expected demand quantity for the item in the period
fields.purpose: The expected demand quantity the buyer enters; the baseline the actual procured quantity is compared against to raise the variance flag and inform forward buying.

fields.name: actualQuantity
fields.label: Actual Quantity
fields.validation: computed from procured/received quantity for the item-period; null until the period accrues actuals
fields.computedFormula: SUM(procured quantity for itemId in period)
fields.purpose: The realized procured quantity for the item-period; the comparison value that, against forecast quantity, produces the variance and its flag.

fields.name: variancePercent
fields.label: Variance %
fields.validation: computed (actualQuantity - quantity) / quantity x 100; null until actual exists
fields.purpose: The deviation of actual from forecast; the figure the configurable variance band tests to decide whether to raise the variance flag.

fields.name: varianceFlag
fields.label: Variance Flag
fields.validation: true when ABS(variancePercent) exceeds the configurable variance band
fields.purpose: Surfaces a forecast that materially missed (AB variance flag) so the buyer reviews the item; the trigger that turns a quiet forecast row into an actionable alert on the analytics view.

invariants: forecasting is manual and procurement-only (not a planning module); month/quarter x quantity with a variance flag
A12 any cost extension normalizes to base currency
A13 audit + SSE on every committed change
